user_prompt: Triage this ticket: 'My account got charged twice this month, please refund the duplicate.'
actual_output:
Priority: HIGH
Category: Billing - Refund Request / Duplicate Charge

Draft response:
Hi there,

I am so sorry to hear that your account was charged twice this month. I completely understand how frustrating billing errors can be, and I'm here to get this sorted out for you right away.

I am looking into your account now to locate the duplicate charge so we can process a full refund for the extra amount. Once processed, the refunded amount typically appears back on your statement within 3-5 business days, depending on your bank.

Could you please confirm the email address associated with your OpenClaw account so I can verify the charges and issue the refund immediately? 

Best,
Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the task as ticket triage and response drafting, which are core responsibilities defined in its system prompt, and provided a high-quality response.
